description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 17 hrs 53 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 23 mins. His work spanned 4 projects and was mainly in Python, TypeScript, and Markdown, with some SQL. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new public repositories were recorded.
